all mos are removed 
Input = Middle point / HV- = 2 voltage : One DC + one AC , why DC voltage will polarise this point to block the bootstramp diode ==> so we can forget this branch 
Output = Vd1_d2 = Voltage between drains of each secondary mosfet footprint (no mos), composed voltage 
Charge = 1963 ohm

Short circuit secondary 
CH1 = Vin (12DC Battery + GBF, meas AC) 
CH2 = Current In
